summary: Iteration 70 - SESSION PERSISTENCE BUG FIX VERIFICATION: All tests PASS. User remains logged in during normal navigation, rapid navigation (7 pages in quick succession), and page reload. The fix in /app/frontend/src/contexts/index.jsx (auto-login only clears token on 401, debounced logout with verification) is working correctly.

minor.issue: 500 errors observed in console (unrelated to session fix)

issues: Minor: Missing Description or aria-describedby accessibility warning

test_results.rapid_navigation_7_pages: PASS - User stayed logged in after navigating 7 pages rapidly (500ms delays)
test_results.page_reload: PASS - User stayed logged in after page reload (auto-login working)
test_results.final_verification: PASS - Navbar shows: Funds $79.0M, CinePass 105, Profile menu visible

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Users get logged out when navigating between pages
fix_details: 1. Auto-login (useEffect) now only clears token on 401 response, not on any error (network errors, timeouts, 5xx keep token)
2. 401 interceptor uses debounced logout (3 second wait) with verification call to /auth/me instead of counter-based approach
3. Any successful response cancels pending logout (handles parallel requests where some fail but others succeed)
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - All navigation and reload tests passed without logout

critical_code_review_comments: Session fix implementation looks correct - debounced logout with verification prevents false logouts from transient errors
Auto-login correctly distinguishes between 401 (auth failure) and other errors (network/timeout/5xx)
Minor accessibility warning: DialogContent components missing Description/aria-describedby
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session persistence bug fix verified and working. Users no longer get logged out during navigation. The fix handles: (1) auto-login only clears token on 401, (2) 401 interceptor uses debounced logout with verification. Some unrelated 500 errors on /chat endpoint observed.
